content.text:
[Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

Find the current USD -> GBP exchange rate. Use web_search to find the latest rate (how many GBP per 1 USD). Report just the rate number and the source/date in one short line.

Begin. Execute the assigned task to completion.
I'll search for the current USD to GBP exchange rate.

arguments.query: USD to GBP exchange rate today 1 USD in GBP

details.error: web_search is disabled or no provider is available.

content.text: web_search is unavailable, so I'll try fetching a rate source directly.
